headline: Is Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Still Attractive After A 58% One-Year Share Price Jump
summary: If you are wondering whether Marathon Petroleum's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown will help you put some clear structure around that question. The stock recently closed at US$235.78, with returns of 2.5% over 7 days, 17.6% over 30 days, 42.8% year to date and 58.5% over the last year. This puts valuation front and center for anyone considering the shares today. Recent market attention around Marathon Petroleum has been shaped by sector wide interest in...
